result.stdout:
Xls2Sql:
  Exporting table creation script from a excel table definition document.

Usage:
  Xls2Sql [options]

Options:
  --source <source>    File path of an excel where your table schema defined. [default: ./tables.xlsx]
  --sheet <sheet>      Name of the sheet to export. [default: all]
  --schema <schema>    Name of schema to create tables in. [default: ]
  --output <output>    File path of output sql script. [default: out.sql]
  --target <target>    target [default: mssql]
  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
